If this holy bath be performed every month on the day of the
asterism Pusya, it would bestow happiness, fame, wealth and pro-
gress on the king. If it be performed on any other day, it would
produce only half the benefits. However, the expiatory ceremony
performed on the Full Moon day in the month of Pusya has been
declared to be the foremost in merits.

Royal Ablution XLVIII 423
TT^cTO>T?Rg I
^ g^ftni Mtj^u
The royal ablution should be performed whenever a kingdom
is afflicted with portents or disasters like epidemics, when there is an
eclipse, when a comet is sighted and when there is a planetary
war.
gxqt srrftcf ucvu
There is no portent in the world that is not warded off by
this ceremony; and there is no auspicious ritual that surpasses this
one.
